panel.title: Arch Updater
panel.name: Name
settings.general.title: General
settings.general.systemCmd.desc: Command to check for system updates (output format: name oldver -> newver)
settings.general.aurCmd.desc: Command to check for AUR updates (output format: name oldver -> newver) leave blank to disable
settings.general.aurHomepageCmd.desc: Command to get homepage for AUR packages (use {id} as package name placeholder)
settings.bar.title: Bar
settings.bar.noctalia.desc: Enable widget highlight if Noctalia components have an update
settings.bar.tooltip.desc: Display the tooltip when hovering over the widget
settings.bar.hideOnEmpty.desc: Hide widget if no updates are available
settings.bar.boldCount.desc: Display the update count in bold
settings.bar.useDistroLogo.desc: Use your distribution logo as the widget icon
settings.bar.enableColorization.desc: Colorize the icon with a custom color
settings.panel.title: Panel
settings.panel.boldVer.desc: Make the new version column bold
settings.panel.tooltip.desc: Show a tooltip when hovering over text in the table
settings.panel.context.desc: Show context menu when right clicking in the table
settings.panel.closeButton.desc: Show close button in the panel
settings.panel.closeOnSettings.desc:
Closes the panel when pressing the settings button
(May fix issues with on-screen keyboards)
settings.desktop.title: Desktop Widget
settings.desktop.boldVer.desc: Make the new version column bold
settings.desktop.hoverTip.desc: Enable hover tip for desktop widget
desktop.name: Name
